svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"><diagram name="AGR Architecture" id="agr-arch"><mxGraphModel dx="1200" dy="800" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="880" pageHeight="620" math="0" shadow="0"><root><mxCell id="0"/><mxCell id="1" parent="0"/><mxCell id="server" value="AGR Server (:8600)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=5;arcSize=8;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="90" y="20" width="700" height="360" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="reg" value="Agent Registry<br><font style="font-size:10px">/registry/agents</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="110" y="60" width="150" height="50" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="gov" value="Governance Evaluate<br><font style="font-size:10px">/governance/evaluate</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="280" y="60" width="170" height="50" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="pol" value="Policy Engine<br><font style="font-size:10px">/policies/rules</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="470" y="60" width="150" height="50" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="aud" value="Audit Trail<br><font style="font-size:10px">/audit/records</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="640" y="60" width="130" height="50" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="auth" value="Auth Resolve<br><font style="font-size:10px">/auth/resolve</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="110" y="130" width="150" height="50" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="bud" value="Budget Tracking<br><font style="font-size:10px">/budget/{agent_id}</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="280" y="130" width="170" height="50" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="apr" value="Approval Flows<br><font style="font-size:10px">/approvals/*</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="470" y="130" width="150" height="50" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="ops" value="Operator RBAC<br><font style="font-size:10px">/operators</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="640" y="130" width="130" height="50" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="dash" value="Fleet Dashboard<br><font style="font-size:10px">/dashboard/*</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="110" y="200" width="150" height="50" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="comp" value="Compliance Export<br><font style="font-size:10px">/compliance/export</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="280" y="200" width="170" height="50" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="store" value="SQLite / PostgreSQL / Cosmos<br><font style="font-size:10px">Pluggable Store</font>" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=10;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="560" y="200" width="180" height="60" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="restapi" value="REST API + OpenAPI<br><font style="font-size:10px">FastAPI (:8600/docs)</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="270" y="290" width="340" height="40" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="mcp" value="AGR MCP Server<br><font style="font-size:10px">Claude Code / Copilot</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="100" y="440" width="180" height="60" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="sdk" value="Python SDK<br><font style="font-size:10px">GovernanceClient</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="350" y="440" width="180" height="60" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="http" value="HTTP / REST<br><font style="font-size:10px">N8N, Copilot Studio, any</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="600" y="440" width="180" height="60" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="agents" value="AI Agents<br><font style="font-size:10px">Any platform, any runtime</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;dashed=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="200" y="550" width="480" height="50" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" edge="1" source="mcp" target="restapi" parent="1"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" edge="1" source="sdk" target="restapi" parent="1"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" edge="1" source="http" target="restapi" parent="1"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;" edge="1" source="agents" target="mcp" parent="1"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;" edge="1" source="agents" target="sdk" parent="1"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;" edge="1" source="agents" target="http" parent="1"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel></diagram></mxfile>
